creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
This is not a bug report but a feature request.

It would be extremely handy if tcpdump(1) could be able to use a divert(4) socket as a packet source. It could even be handier if several of such sockets could be used at the same time. For multi-socket operation, the port of the source socket should be part of the dissection output.

The intended use is to help troubleshoot a defective ipfw ruleset live without deferring through the ipfwpcap(8) intermediate step.
